name: Sepia
description: Warm sepia tones for comfortable extended reading sessions.

preview.sampleText: Warm sepia tones for a gentle, book-like reading experience.

classes.h1: text-3xl font-bold mb-4 text-yellow-900 dark:text-amber-200 leading-tight
classes.a: text-amber-700 dark:text-amber-400 hover:text-amber-900 dark:hover:text-amber-300 underline underline-offset-2
classes.img: max-w-full my-4 rounded border border-yellow-300 dark:border-yellow-700
classes.tr: border border-yellow-300 dark:border-yellow-700 even:bg-yellow-100 dark:even:bg-yellow-900/20 odd:bg-yellow-50 dark:odd:bg-yellow-950/20
classes.th: border border-yellow-300 dark:border-yellow-700 p-2 bg-yellow-200 dark:bg-yellow-900/40 font-semibold text-yellow-900 dark:text-amber-200
classes.blockquote: border-l-4 border-amber-600 dark:border-amber-500 pl-4 italic my-4 text-yellow-800 dark:text-amber-200 bg-yellow-100 dark:bg-yellow-900/20 py-2 rounded-r
classes.code: bg-yellow-200 dark:bg-yellow-900/40 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded font-mono text-sm text-yellow-900 dark:text-amber-200
classes.pre: bg-yellow-100 dark:bg-yellow-950/40 p-4 rounded overflow-x-auto border border-yellow-300 dark:border-yellow-700
